findings.title: Placeholder page: System Health
findings.description: Route /workspace/admin/system-health resolves to the catch-all placeholder (WorkspaceModulePage) instead of a dedicated component. Shows generic module description and links instead of real workflow.
findings.rootCause: No dedicated page.tsx file with a real component import exists for this route. The app/workspace/[...slug]/page.tsx catch-all handles it.
suggestedFixes: Create app/workspace/admin/system-health/page.tsx with a dedicated component.
Build the component with proper register/form/dashboard pattern matching the module's purpose.
Remove reliance on catch-all for this route.

findings.title: Item code uniqueness not validated server-side
findings.description: QuickCreateItemForm now enforces mandatory item codes for inventory-tracked items, but uniqueness validation is only client-side. Server-side unique constraint on item_code is needed.
findings.rootCause: Backend Item model does not yet enforce a unique constraint on the sku/item_code column.
suggestedFixes: Add unique index on items.sku in the database migration.
Return 422 with clear message when duplicate code is submitted.

findings.title: Bill/expense account classification too shallow
findings.description: The bill creation form does not explicitly support expense categories like salary, HR, R&D, PR, utilities, rent, consulting through the account selection path. Users must manually pick the right expense account without category guidance.
findings.rootCause: TransactionForm uses a flat account picker without expense-category grouping or shortcuts.
suggestedFixes: Group expense accounts by category in the account picker: Operations, HR & Payroll, Professional Services, Administrative, Utilities, Marketing.
Show expense account category hints in the line item editor when creating bills.
Ensure the CoA has appropriate expense sub-accounts for these categories.

findings.title: Journal entry account dropdown may clip or overflow
findings.description: The journal entry form uses an account picker dropdown that may clip behind other UI elements or overflow the viewport, making account selection difficult.
findings.rootCause: Dropdown z-index and positioning may not account for the workspace shell's sidebar and header layers.
suggestedFixes: Ensure account picker dropdown uses z-50 or higher.
Use portal-based dropdown rendering to escape parent overflow:hidden containers.
Test with sidebar open and closed states.

findings.title: Layout Editor may lack EditableRegion wrappers on pages
findings.description: The Layout Editor infrastructure (LayoutEditorProvider, LayoutEditorPanel, EditableRegion) was built but EditableRegion wrappers may not be applied to individual page components yet, limiting editor functionality.
findings.rootCause: EditableRegion must wrap specific page sections for the layout editor to detect and modify them.
suggestedFixes: Wrap key page sections (register, preview, toolbar, sidebar groups) in EditableRegion.
Assign meaningful regionId values for each wrapped section.

findings.title: 20 sidebar routes resolve to placeholders
findings.description: 20 routes in the sidebar navigation resolve to the catch-all placeholder page instead of dedicated components. This creates a poor navigation experience where users click menu items and see generic module descriptions.
findings.rootCause: Many routes lack dedicated page.tsx files with real component implementations.
suggestedFixes: Prioritize building dedicated pages for high-traffic routes (reports, ledger, banking, reconciliation).
For lower-priority routes, build at minimum a proper empty-state component instead of the generic WorkspaceModulePage.

findings.title: Missing audit trail UI for journal entries and documents
findings.description: While AuditTrailPanel component exists and AuditLog model is in the backend, the journal entries register and document registers may not consistently show audit trail information inline.
findings.rootCause: Audit trail panel needs explicit integration in each register's detail/preview view.
suggestedFixes: Ensure InvoiceDetailWorkspace includes AuditTrailPanel.
Add audit trail tab/section to journal entry detail view.
Connect to backend AuditLog model for real event data.
